description: A node in the Child Graph that generates a targeted cover letter markdown based on the tailored resume and job details.

userStories.title: Cover Letter Generation Logic
userStories.description: As a job seeker, I want the system to generate a tailored cover letter using the job details and my updated resume, so that I have a highly relevant cover letter ready for PDF compilation.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: Generating a cover letter from job details and resume
Given the system is in the Child Graph processing pipeline
and Given the state has tailored_resume (or base_resume), job_details, and strategy_markdown
Then it uses gpt-4o to generate a professional cover letter following the directives (targeting, alignment, tone)
and Then it updates the cover_letter_markdown state key

tasks.description: Define the system prompt for cover letter generation incorporating the key directives (Targeting, Alignment, Tone) as outlined in prompt_details.MD.
Implement the CoverLetterGeneratorNode logic to call the LLM (gpt-4o) and generate the markdown.
Update the Child Graph to include CoverLetterGeneratorNode in the workflow.
Write a unit test for CoverLetterGeneratorNode mocking the LLM call to verify state updates.

userStories.notes: Follow prompt details from prompt_details.MD for Cover Letter Generator Node.
